Notice Of Demurrer To Complaint For Mandamus And Declaratory Relief Or In The Alternative, Motion To Strike Demand For Retroactive Monetary Relief 2-Demurrer To Complaint For Mandamus And Declaratory; 3- Memorandum Of P/A In Support
Off Calendar Jan-26-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Karin S. Schwartz, Deputy Attorney General (415) 703-1382, for Defendant and Moving Party State Department Of Health Services Of The State of California
Mark Reagan, Esq. and Mark Johnson, Esq., Hooper Lundy & Bookman (415) 875-8519, for Plaintiff and Opposing Party California Association of Health Facilities
RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling: DEFENDANT STATE DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH SERVICES OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S 1) Demurrer To Complaint For Mandamus And Declaratory Relief Or, In The Alternative, Motion To Strike Demand For Retroactive Monetary Relief 2) Demurrer To Complaint For Mandamus And Declaratory: SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to the 1st - 3rd Causes of Actions; 5th Cause of Action is SUSTAINED with leave to amend if the Petitioner can do so in good faith. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/PHA/DS) Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220
